features: A stylish glass container designed to quickly fill home with fragrance
Comes in a variety of scents
Fragrance lingers after the candle is blown out, including limited edition fragrances
Consistent fragrance experience from beginning to end
Formulated with a specialist wax and infused with essential oils
description: Product Description Keep your home smelling warm and cosy with Glade Candles. The combination of alluring and unique fragrances of Glade and warm light quickly fills your home with comfort. Each Glade candle provides a consistent fragrance experience from beginning to end. Everyone knows dessert is the cure for lifting spirits. Warm your home and your heart with the delicious fragrance of Glade Honey & Chocolate. Safety Warning Be careful not to use the candle near flammable materials. Do not leave the candle burning unattended. Dispose of the candle professionally after use.
